'''Tondatha''' was a suburb of the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Calna Muun]] on [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]]. It was the hometown of [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]. When an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] assault craft bombarded the town, Keyan raced back to find that his parents living there had been killed.

{{Loc-stub}}
